overview_zh: 本期从 181 个结构化来源中生成，候选 144 条，跨期排除历史已展示 52 条，入选 18 条。所有条目均保留原始来源链接；若真实抓取不足，则仅发布未展示过的来源索引记录，不用测试数据冒充更新。
overview_en: This brief is generated from 181 structured sources with 144 candidates, 52 previously displayed items excluded, and 18 selected items. Every item keeps an original source link; if live fetching is insufficient, the site publishes only not-yet-shown source-index records instead of fake news.

items.title: New OpenAI Academy courses for the next era of work

items.title: The mistake of conflating intelligence and power
items.summary_zh: 重点：f this is your definition of intelligence is the ability to achieve your goals across a wide variety of domains, then Stalin was the most intelligent person who ever lived.
